heading: Misuse of benefits by fiduciaries
label: 6106 Misuse of benefits by fiduciaries
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to any determinations by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs made after , of misuse of funds by a fiduciary, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(b)(2) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to any determinations by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs made after , of misuse of funds by a fiduciary, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(b)(2) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title

children.heading: .—Fee Forfeiture in Case of Benefit Misuse by Fiduciaries
children.label: a .—Fee Forfeiture in Case of Benefit Misuse by Fiduciaries
children.text: A fiduciary may not collect a fee from a beneficiary for any month with respect to which the Secretary or a court of competent jurisdiction has determined that the fiduciary misused all or part of the individual’s benefit, and any amount so collected by the fiduciary as a fee for such month shall be treated as a misused part of the individual’s benefit.

children.heading: .—Misuse of Benefits Defined
children.label: b .—Misuse of Benefits Defined
children.text: For purposes of this chapter, misuse of benefits by a fiduciary occurs in any case in which the fiduciary receives payment, under any of laws administered by the Secretary, for the use and benefit of a beneficiary and uses such payment, or any part thereof, for a use other than for the use and benefit of such beneficiary or that beneficiary’s dependents. Retention by a fiduciary of an amount of a benefit payment as a fiduciary fee or commission, or as attorney’s fees (including expenses) and court costs, if authorized by the Secretary or a court of competent jurisdiction, shall be considered to be for the use or benefit of such beneficiary.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: c .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe by regulation the meaning of the term “use and benefit” for purposes of this section.
